title: quercus magnoliifolia var. macrophylla
intro: Quercus magnoliifolia var. macrophylla, also known as the Large-leaved Chinese Oak, is a variant of the Quercus magnoliifolia tree species native to China. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and bark, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus magnoliifolia var. macrophylla include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments, such as digestive issues and skin problems.
